response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks demonstrable deep expertise in JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — core requirements for this role. His Java exposure is minimal and buried in older roles, with no evidence of IDE internals or JVM-level optimization work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems-level engineering background across multiple languages
Proven track record in building developer tooling and open-source projects
Excellent communication and teaching skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal recent or deep Java/Kotlin experience; no clear enterprise framework (Spring/Quarkus) work
No evidence of IDE internals, language server protocol, or JVM tooling development
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with JVM-centric role requirements
